---
title: '`r paste("Chikv | Pathway analysis |", params$database, "GSEA")`'
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "06.P.compute_pathways"
  this_step: "06.V.pathways_results"
  database: "GO"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=F, warning=F, echo=F)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(ggplot2)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(enrichplot)
library(rmdreportdeck)
reportdeck_setup()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache=F)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis, "/"))

input_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/")
input_var_dir  <- paste0(input_step_dir, "results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir)) {
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)
}

this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$this_step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir)) {
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)
}

results_dir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/")

db <- params$database
input_rds_map <- c(
  GO       = "so_w_pathways.GO.rds",
  KEGG     = "so_w_pathways.KEGG.rds",
  MSigDb   = "so_w_pathways.MSigDB.rds",
  Reactome = "so_w_pathways.Reactome.rds"
)
if (!db %in% names(input_rds_map)) {
  stop("Unknown database: ", db,
       ". Valid values: ", paste(names(input_rds_map), collapse = ", "))
}
input_rds <- input_rds_map[[db]]
step_pfx  <- paste0("V06-", tolower(db), "-gsea")

helpers_dir <- here::here("helpers/")
source(paste0(helpers_dir, "pathway_analysis_viz_helpers.R"))
source(paste0(helpers_dir, "pathway_analysis_comp_helpers.R"))
```

# Goal

Visualize `r params$database` pathway analysis GSEA results computed in the pathway analysis step.
Displays enriched `r params$database` terms per cell type and condition pair as interactive tables,
with downloadable assets for each result.

```{r load_input_data}
so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, input_rds))
celltypes    <- c(unique(as.character(so$celltype)), "Total")
cond_pairs   <- c("A", "M6", "NC", "C")
cond_pairs_lbl <- c("A.C_vs_NC", "6M.C_vs_NC", "NC.A_vs_6M", "C.A_vs_6M")
names(cond_pairs_lbl) <- cond_pairs
```

```{r strsanitize}
strsanitize <- function(s) {
  gsub(" ", "_", gsub("[^[:alnum:]]", "_", s))
}
```

```{r gsea_tables}
for (pair in cond_pairs) {
  for (ct in celltypes) {
    cts <- strsanitize(ct)
    pfx <- paste0(cond_pairs_lbl[pair], ".", cts)
    dirname <- paste0(results_dir, cond_pairs_lbl[pair], "/", db, "/GSEA/", cts, "/")
    if (!is.null(so@misc$gsea[[db]][[pair]][[ct]])) {
      dir.create(dirname, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
      fname <- paste0(dirname, pfx, ".GSEA.", db, ".tsv")
      write.table(so@misc$gsea[[db]][[pair]][[ct]], file = fname,
                  sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
    }
  }
}
```

```{r results, results='asis', echo=F}
make_section_block_pfx <- function(...) {
  sanitize_name(paste(..., collapse = "-"))
}

append_plot_item <- function(items, title, block_pfx, figtab_id, file_stem,
                             plot_obj, width, height,
                             tsv_name = NULL, tsv_uri = NULL) {
  asset_links <- list(
    report_download_link(
      "Download PNG",
      paste0(report_figure_name(block_pfx, file_stem), ".png"),
      report_plot_png_data_uri(plot_obj, width = width, height = height)
    ),
    report_download_link(
      "Download PDF",
      paste0(report_figure_name(block_pfx, file_stem), ".pdf"),
      report_plot_pdf_data_uri(plot_obj, width = width, height = height)
    )
  )
  if (!is.null(tsv_name) && !is.null(tsv_uri)) {
    asset_links <- c(asset_links, list(
      report_download_link("Download TSV", tsv_name, tsv_uri)
    ))
  }
  items[[length(items) + 1L]] <- report_item_panel(
    title = paste0(title, " (Fig/Tab ", figtab_id, ")"),
    id = block_pfx,
    asset_bar = do.call(report_asset_bar, c(list("Downloads"), asset_links)),
    report_item_plot(plot_obj, width = width, height = height)
  )
  items
}

emit_section <- function(cell_items, no_results_cts) {
  if (length(cell_items) > 0L) {
    cat(as.character(report_loop_section(
      cell_items,
      open_first = FALSE,
      max_open = 999L,
      level = 2L
    )))
    cat("\n")
  }
  if (length(no_results_cts) > 0L) {
    cat("\n\n## Cell types with no significant results\n\n")
    cat(paste0("- ", no_results_cts, collapse = "\n"), "\n\n")
  }
}

for (pair_idx in seq_along(cond_pairs)) {
  pair     <- cond_pairs[[pair_idx]]
  pair_lbl <- cond_pairs_lbl[[pair]]
  cat(paste0("\n# ", pair_lbl, "\n\n"))
  cell_items     <- list()
  no_results_cts <- character(0)

  for (ct_idx in seq_along(celltypes)) {
    ct  <- celltypes[[ct_idx]]
    cts <- strsanitize(ct)
    pfx <- paste0(pair_lbl, ".", cts)
    ct_block_pfx  <- make_section_block_pfx(step_pfx, pair_idx, ct_idx, cts)
    ct_figtab_pfx <- make_section_block_pfx(step_pfx, pair_idx, ct_idx)
    plot_items <- list()
    plot_idx   <- 0L

    sorted_sym <- get_sorted_gene_symbols(so@misc$de[[pair]]$all[[ct]])
    sorted_eid <- get_sorted_gene_entrez_IDs(so@misc$de[[pair]]$all[[ct]], verbose = FALSE)
    sorted_genes <- if (db %in% c("GO", "MSigDb")) sorted_sym else sorted_eid

    gsea_results <- so@misc$gsea[[db]][[pair]][[ct]]
    if (!is.null(gsea_results) && nrow(gsea_results) > 0) {
      gsea_tsv_name <- report_table_name(
        ct_block_pfx, paste0(pfx, ".GSEA.", db, ".tsv"))
      gsea_tsv_uri <- report_text_data_uri(
        report_tsv_text(as.data.frame(gsea_results)))
      dirname <- paste0(results_dir, pair_lbl, "/", db, "/GSEA/", cts, "/plots/")
      dir.create(dirname, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
      gsea_plts <- list(
        barplot  = list(plt = try(gsea_barplot( gsea_results,               paste0(dirname, pfx, ".GSEA.barplot.pdf"),  show = F)), w = 10, h = 8),
        dotplot  = list(plt = try(gsea_dotplot( gsea_results,               paste0(dirname, pfx, ".GSEA.dotplot.pdf"),  show = F)), w = 8,  h = 12),
        cnetplot = list(plt = try(gsea_cnetplot(gsea_results, sorted_genes, paste0(dirname, pfx, ".GSEA.cnetplot.pdf"), show = F)), w = 8,  h = 8),
        heatmap  = list(plt = try(gsea_heatmap( gsea_results, sorted_genes, paste0(dirname, pfx, ".GSEA.heatmap.pdf"),  show = F)), w = 10, h = 8),
        emapplot = list(plt = try(gsea_emapplot(gsea_results,               paste0(dirname, pfx, ".GSEA.emapplot.pdf"), show = F)), w = 10, h = 8),
        ridgeplot= list(plt = try(gsea_ridgeplot(gsea_results,              paste0(dirname, pfx, ".GSEA.ridgeplot.pdf"),show = F)), w = 10, h = 8)
      )
      for (nm in names(gsea_plts)) {
        ps <- gsea_plts[[nm]]
        if (!inherits(ps$plt, "try-error") && !is.null(ps$plt)) {
          plot_idx <- plot_idx + 1L
          plot_block_pfx <- make_section_block_pfx(ct_block_pfx, db, "GSEA", nm)
          plot_figtab_id <- make_section_block_pfx(ct_figtab_pfx, plot_idx)
          plot_items <- append_plot_item(
            plot_items,
            title      = paste(db, "GSEA", nm),
            block_pfx  = plot_block_pfx,
            figtab_id  = plot_figtab_id,
            file_stem  = paste0(pfx, ".GSEA.", db, ".", nm),
            plot_obj   = ps$plt,
            width      = ps$w,
            height     = ps$h,
            tsv_name   = gsea_tsv_name,
            tsv_uri    = gsea_tsv_uri
          )
        }
      }
    }

    if (length(plot_items) > 0L) {
      cell_items[[length(cell_items) + 1L]] <- report_item_panel(
        title = ct,
        id    = ct_block_pfx,
        report_loop_section(
          plot_items,
          open_first = FALSE,
          max_open   = 999L,
          level      = 3L
        )
      )
    } else {
      no_results_cts <- c(no_results_cts, ct)
    }
  }
  emit_section(cell_items, no_results_cts)
}
```

# Session info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
